Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Interrogatory Responses & Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on THU-AUG-08-2013:
Francis J. Shehadeh, Esq. [415.771.6174] appearing for Plaintiff ELIZABETH MCKAGUE;
No appearance by or on behalf of defendant

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff ELIZABETH MCKAGUE'S Motion To Compel Further Interrogatory Responses & Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED, with qualification. Defendant is to serve responsive and verified answers to Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories, Set 2, with the exception of providing information regarding dates of birth, within 10 days of this order. Defendant shall pay Plaintiff monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,000 within 10 days of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey R. Windsor; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
